title: Principal Radiologist at Becton Dickinson India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Becton Dickinson India
jsonLd.description:
Becton Dickinson India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
